summary: Full SEO implementation testing completed for golevents.com clone. All requested features working: sitemap.xml with multilingual URLs, robots.txt, Schema.org JSON-LD injection, and breadcrumbs on all pages.

sitemap_xml.details: /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with multilingual URLs (IT, EN, ES), hreflang tags, correct priorities (1.0 homepage, 0.9 leagues, 0.8 teams, 0.7 events), includes all leagues, teams, and database events

robots_txt.details: /api/robots.txt returns correct content: User-agent: *, Allow: /, Sitemap URL, Crawl-delay, Disallow /admin/

homepage.details: Homepage loads correctly with OrganizationSchema JSON-LD injected in head

league_page.details: /biglietti-serie-a shows breadcrumbs (HOME > Serie A), 20 teams grid, LeagueSchema and BreadcrumbSchema JSON-LD injected

event_detail.details: /event/{id} shows breadcrumbs (HOME > League > Event), event info (date, stadium, location), ticket categories with prices, EventSchema and BreadcrumbSchema JSON-LD injected correctly

team_page.details: /biglietti-inter shows breadcrumbs, 8 matches found, TeamSchema and BreadcrumbSchema JSON-LD injected

multilingual_urls.details: All 3 URL formats work: IT (/biglietti-*), EN (/*-tickets), ES (/entradas-*) - All return 200 OK

schema_org_content.details: JSON-LD schemas contain valid data: EventSchema has @type:SportsEvent, name, startDate, location.name, offers.lowPrice/highPrice; BreadcrumbSchema has proper itemListElement with positions

seed_data_creation: None - used existing event data (174 events in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO implementation complete. Sitemap.xml generates multilingual URLs with hreflang. Schema.org uses useEffect hook to inject JSON-LD in DOM (react-helmet-async was replaced). Breadcrumbs visible on all inner pages. All 3 language URL formats supported.
